**Use case**
Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address.

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**FRM reference** (if applicable)
If this relates to the Fractal Rhythm Model, reference the relevant axiom or paper.
